message:
fix(ft-autograd): pass correct input node ID to ensure_tensor_len validation

Fix critical bug where ensure_tensor_len() was receiving the output
node_id instead of the input node_id in 12 activation and logarithmic
backward functions: Log2, Log10, Log1p, Asin, Acos, Atan, Sinh, Cosh,
Gelu, Silu, LeakyRelu, Elu.

This caused incorrect tensor length validation during backpropagation,
potentially allowing gradient computation on mismatched tensor shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
